mnemonics: Divide and Conquer is like a Chef: Cut the Cake (Divide), Conquer the Flavors (Conquer)
Mergent Sort: Merge the Wars, Sort the Peace
keyPoints: Merge Sort: Divide into 2 halves, Recursively sort each half, Merge the sorted halves
Quick Sort: Choose a Pivot, Partition the array, Recursively sort the subarrays
Binary Tree Traversals: Traverse using In-Order (Left-Root-Right), Pre-Order (Root-Left-Right), Post-Order (Left-Right-Root)
Multiplication of Large Integers: Use the Karatsuba Algorithm for 2-digit numbers, Use the Schönhage-Strassen Algorithm for n-digit numbers
Strassen’s Matrix Multiplication: Divide into 7 smaller matrices, Combine the results using the 7-tuple (1 - 1, 1 - 2, ..., 1 - 7)
